# Greyfriars-Brochure
<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Greyfriars Club – Function Hire Brochure</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=EB+Garamond:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,700;1,400;1,500&family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Josefin+Sans:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --forest: #1a3d2b;
    --forest-deep: #0f2419;
    --forest-mid: #1f4a30;
    --gold: #c9972a;
    --gold-light: #e8b84b;
    --gold-pale: #f5e4b8;
    --cream: #fdf6e3;
    --white: #ffffff;
    --text-light: #e8dcc8;
    --text-muted: #a89870;
  }

- { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

body {
background: #0a0a0a;
font-family: ‘EB Garamond’, Georgia, serif;
color: var(–cream);
}

.page-label {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 9px;
letter-spacing: 4px;
color: #444;
text-transform: uppercase;
text-align: center;
margin: 20px 0 8px;
}

.brochure-page {
width: 1200px;
margin: 0 auto 60px;
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
min-height: 870px;
box-shadow: 0 40px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.85);
overflow: hidden;
}

/* ══════════════════════
PANEL 1 — HERO / ABOUT
══════════════════════ */
.panel-1 {
background: var(–forest-deep);
position: relative;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
overflow: hidden;
}

.panel-1-hero {
position: relative;
height: 260px;
overflow: hidden;
flex-shrink: 0;
}

.panel-1-hero img {
width: 100%; height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
object-position: center 30%;
filter: brightness(.72) saturate(1.15);
display: block;
}

.panel-1-hero-overlay {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(
to bottom,
rgba(15,36,25,.3) 0%,
rgba(15,36,25,.0) 40%,
rgba(15,36,25,.9) 100%
);
}

.panel-1-hero-text {
position: absolute;
bottom: 18px;
left: 24px;
right: 24px;
}

.est-label {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 9px;
letter-spacing: 4px;
color: var(–gold-light);
text-transform: uppercase;
margin-bottom: 5px;
opacity: .9;
}

.brand-name {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 38px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–white);
line-height: 1.0;
margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.brand-name em {
font-style: italic;
color: var(–gold-light);
}

.brand-tag {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8.5px;
letter-spacing: 3.5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
opacity: .85;
}

.gold-bar {
height: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(–gold), var(–gold-light), transparent);
margin: 0;
}

.panel-1-body {
padding: 20px 24px;
flex: 1;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 14px;
}

.about-intro {
font-size: 13.5px;
line-height: 1.78;
color: var(–text-light);
font-weight: 400;
}

.about-intro strong {
color: var(–gold-light);
font-style: italic;
}

.stats-row {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
gap: 8px;
}

.stat-box {
background: rgba(201,151,42,.08);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.22);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 10px 6px;
text-align: center;
}

.stat-num {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 26px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–gold-light);
line-height: 1;
display: block;
}

.stat-lbl {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7.5px;
letter-spacing: 1.5px;
color: var(–text-muted);
text-transform: uppercase;
display: block;
margin-top: 3px;
}

.pull-quote {
border-left: 2px solid var(–gold);
padding-left: 14px;
font-style: italic;
font-size: 13px;
color: var(–text-muted);
line-height: 1.65;
}

.tags-wrap {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 5px;
}

.tag {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7.5px;
letter-spacing: 1.2px;
color: var(–gold);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.35);
padding: 4px 8px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.testimonial-box {
background: rgba(201,151,42,.07);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.18);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 12px 14px;
}

.stars { color: var(–gold-light); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; margin-bottom: 5px; }

.test-text {
font-style: italic;
font-size: 12px;
color: var(–text-light);
line-height: 1.6;
margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.test-author {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8px;
letter-spacing: 2px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.panel-1-footer {
padding: 14px 24px 22px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.12);
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 10px;
}

.contact-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 6px 10px;
}

.c-item {
font-size: 10px;
color: var(–text-muted);
line-height: 1.5;
}

.c-item b {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7.5px;
letter-spacing: 1.5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
display: block;
font-weight: 600;
}

.cta-btn {
display: block;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–gold) 0%, var(–gold-light) 100%);
color: var(–forest-deep);
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 10.5px;
font-weight: 700;
letter-spacing: 3px;
text-transform: uppercase;
text-align: center;
padding: 13px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-decoration: none;
box-shadow: 0 6px 22px rgba(201,151,42,.3);
}

/* ══════════════════════
PANEL 2 — HIRE + DECO
══════════════════════ */
.panel-2 {
background: var(–forest-mid);
position: relative;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
overflow: hidden;
}

.panel-2-hero {
position: relative;
height: 200px;
overflow: hidden;
flex-shrink: 0;
}

.panel-2-hero img {
width: 100%; height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
object-position: center 25%;
filter: brightness(.65) saturate(1.1);
display: block;
}

.panel-2-hero-overlay {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 30%, rgba(31,74,48,.95) 100%);
}

.panel-2-hero-text {
position: absolute;
bottom: 16px;
left: 24px;
right: 24px;
}

.ph-eyebrow {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8.5px;
letter-spacing: 3.5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.ph-title {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 28px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–white);
line-height: 1.05;
}

.ph-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(–gold-light); }

.panel-2-body {
padding: 18px 24px;
flex: 1;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 16px;
}

.section-label {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8.5px;
letter-spacing: 3px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
margin-bottom: 9px;
}

.price-cards {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 8px;
margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.price-card {
background: rgba(15,36,25,.55);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.2);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 12px;
}

.price-card.featured {
border-color: var(–gold);
background: rgba(201,151,42,.1);
}

.pc-name {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 13px;
color: var(–white);
margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.pc-rate {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 22px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–gold-light);
line-height: 1;
}

.pc-rate span {
font-size: 11px;
color: var(–text-muted);
font-family: ‘EB Garamond’, serif;
font-weight: 400;
}

.pc-note { font-size: 10px; color: var(–text-muted); margin-top: 3px; }

.includes {
display: flex;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 5px;
margin-top: 2px;
}

.inc-tag {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8px;
color: var(–text-light);
background: rgba(201,151,42,.07);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.15);
padding: 3px 7px;
border-radius: 2px;
letter-spacing: .5px;
}

.inc-tag::before { content: ’✦ ’; color: var(–gold); font-size: 7px; }

.ornament {
text-align: center;
color: rgba(201,151,42,.45);
font-size: 12px;
letter-spacing: 5px;
margin: -4px 0;
}

.deco-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 5px;
}

.deco-row {
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: center;
background: rgba(15,36,25,.45);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.13);
border-radius: 2px;
padding: 7px 9px;
}

.deco-name { font-size: 10px; color: var(–text-light); line-height: 1.3; }

.deco-price {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 11.5px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–gold-light);
white-space: nowrap;
margin-left: 5px;
}

.deco-own {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,151,42,.12), rgba(201,151,42,.04));
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.25);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 10px 13px;
font-style: italic;
font-size: 11.5px;
color: var(–text-light);
line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Hire form */
.form-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 8px 10px;
margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.ff { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.ff.full { grid-column: 1/-1; }

.ff label {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7px;
letter-spacing: 2px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.ff-line {
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.3);
min-height: 22px;
}

.cap-box {
background: rgba(201,151,42,.08);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.2);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 9px 11px;
font-size: 11px;
color: var(–text-light);
line-height: 1.55;
}

.cap-box b {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8px;
letter-spacing: 1px;
color: var(–gold-light);
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.panel-2-footer {
padding: 13px 24px 22px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.12);
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 9px;
}

.sig-note {
font-size: 10.5px;
color: var(–text-muted);
line-height: 1.6;
font-style: italic;
}

.sig-line {
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.3);
height: 26px;
margin-bottom: 3px;
}

.sig-lbl {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7.5px;
letter-spacing: 2px;
color: var(–text-muted);
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.deposit-badge {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–gold), var(–gold-light));
color: var(–forest-deep);
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 9px;
font-weight: 700;
letter-spacing: 2.5px;
text-align: center;
padding: 10px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* ══════════════════════
PANEL 3 — CATERING + T&C
══════════════════════ */
.panel-3 {
background: var(–forest);
position: relative;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
overflow: hidden;
}

.panel-3-hero {
position: relative;
height: 200px;
overflow: hidden;
flex-shrink: 0;
}

.panel-3-hero img {
width: 100%; height: 100%;
object-fit: cover;
object-position: center 20%;
filter: brightness(.6) saturate(1.1);
display: block;
}

.panel-3-hero-overlay {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent 20%, rgba(26,61,43,.97) 100%);
}

.panel-3-hero-text {
position: absolute;
bottom: 16px;
left: 24px;
right: 24px;
}

.panel-3-body {
padding: 16px 24px;
flex: 1;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 13px;
overflow: hidden;
}

/* Package cards */
.pkg-row {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
gap: 6px;
}

.pkg-card {
background: rgba(15,36,25,.55);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.18);
border-radius: 3px;
overflow: hidden;
}

.pkg-card.featured { border-color: var(–gold); background: rgba(201,151,42,.08); }

.pkg-head {
background: rgba(15,36,25,.6);
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.2);
padding: 8px 9px;
text-align: center;
}

.pkg-card.featured .pkg-head {
background: rgba(201,151,42,.18);
}

.pkg-title {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 12.5px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–white);
margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.pkg-price {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 17px;
font-weight: 700;
color: var(–gold-light);
}

.pkg-price span { font-size: 9px; color: var(–text-muted); font-family:‘EB Garamond’,serif; font-weight:400; }
.pkg-min { font-size: 8.5px; color: var(–text-muted); }

.pkg-body { padding: 8px 9px; }

.pkg-items {
list-style: none;
font-size: 9.5px;
color: var(–text-light);
line-height: 1.8;
}

.pkg-items li::before { content: ’· ’; color: var(–gold); }

/* Hot catering */
.hot-box {
background: rgba(15,36,25,.5);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.18);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 11px;
}

.hot-head {
display: flex;
align-items: baseline;
gap: 8px;
flex-wrap: wrap;
margin-bottom: 7px;
}

.hot-head h4 {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 14px;
color: var(–white);
}

.hot-head span {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7.5px;
letter-spacing: 1.5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.hot-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 2px 10px;
}

.hot-item {
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
font-size: 10px;
color: var(–text-light);
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.08);
padding: 2.5px 0;
}

.hp { color: var(–gold-light); font-family: ‘EB Garamond’, serif; font-weight: 600; }

/* Desserts */
.dessert-box {
background: rgba(15,36,25,.4);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.13);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 10px 11px;
}

.dessert-box h4 {
font-family: ‘Libre Baskerville’, serif;
font-size: 13px;
color: var(–white);
margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.dessert-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 2px 10px;
}

.d-item {
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
font-size: 9.5px;
color: var(–text-light);
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.07);
padding: 2px 0;
}

.dp { color: var(–gold-light); font-family:‘EB Garamond’,serif; font-weight:600; }

.flex-note {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,151,42,.14), rgba(201,151,42,.04));
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.3);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 10px 13px;
font-style: italic;
font-size: 11.5px;
color: var(–text-light);
line-height: 1.6;
text-align: center;
}

/* T&Cs */
.tc-box {
background: rgba(15,36,25,.7);
border: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.18);
border-radius: 3px;
padding: 11px 13px;
}

.tc-box h4 {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8.5px;
letter-spacing: 3px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
margin-bottom: 7px;
}

.tc-alert {
background: rgba(201,151,42,.13);
border-left: 3px solid var(–gold);
padding: 6px 10px;
font-size: 9.5px;
color: var(–gold-pale);
font-weight: 600;
margin-bottom: 8px;
line-height: 1.4;
}

.tc-list {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
gap: 2px 12px;
list-style: none;
}

.tc-list li {
font-size: 8.5px;
color: var(–text-muted);
line-height: 1.65;
padding-left: 9px;
position: relative;
}

.tc-list li::before {
content: ‘—’;
position: absolute;
left: 0;
color: var(–gold);
font-size: 7px;
}

.tc-list li strong { color: var(–text-light); }

.nr-banner {
background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(–gold) 0%, var(–gold-light) 100%);
color: var(–forest-deep);
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8px;
font-weight: 700;
letter-spacing: 3px;
text-align: center;
padding: 8px;
text-transform: uppercase;
flex-shrink: 0;
}

.panel-3-footer {
padding: 12px 24px 20px;
border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,151,42,.12);
display: flex;
justify-content: space-between;
align-items: center;
gap: 10px;
flex-shrink: 0;
}

.footer-contact {
font-size: 9.5px;
color: var(–text-muted);
line-height: 1.7;
}

.footer-contact b {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 7.5px;
letter-spacing: 1.5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
display: block;
margin-bottom: 2px;
}

.social-col {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
gap: 3px;
align-items: flex-end;
}

.social-handle {
font-family: ‘Josefin Sans’, sans-serif;
font-size: 8px;
letter-spacing: 1.5px;
color: var(–gold);
text-transform: uppercase;
}

@media print {
body { background: white; }
.brochure-page { box-shadow: none; page-break-after: always; }
.page-label { display: none; }
}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<p class="page-label">Greyfriars Club — Function Hire Brochure</p>

<div class="brochure-page">

  <!-- ═══ PANEL 1: ABOUT / HERO ═══ -->

  <div class="panel-1">
    <div class="panel-1-hero">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Greyfriars beautifully set for a wedding">
      <div class="panel-1-hero-overlay"></div>
      <div class="panel-1-hero-text">
        <div class="est-label">Established 1959 · Nottingham</div>
        <div class="brand-name">The <em>Greyfriars</em> Club</div>
        <div class="brand-tag">Community · Celebration · Charity</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="gold-bar"></div>

```
<div class="panel-1-body">
  <p class="about-intro">A community interest company serving Nottingham since 1959. <strong>Every pound of profit is reinvested</strong> back into the club and the local causes we champion — from food banks to charity fundraisers throughout the year.</p>

  <div class="stats-row">
    <div class="stat-box">
      <span class="stat-num">200</span>
      <span class="stat-lbl">Standing</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-box">
      <span class="stat-num">144</span>
      <span class="stat-lbl">Seated</span>
    </div>
    <div class="stat-box">
      <span class="stat-num">2</span>
      <span class="stat-lbl">Rooms</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="pull-quote">"A warm, accommodating venue for every occasion — from birthday celebrations to memorial gatherings, with a fully stocked bar and all the atmosphere you need."</p>

  <div class="tags-wrap">
    <span class="tag">Private Functions</span>
    <span class="tag">Weddings</span>
    <span class="tag">Memorials</span>
    <span class="tag">Charity Events</span>
    <span class="tag">Community Gatherings</span>
    <span class="tag">Fundraisers</span>
  </div>

  <div class="testimonial-box">
    <div class="stars">★★★★★</div>
    <p class="test-text">"The team made our event truly special. The room was stunning and the support throughout the booking process was outstanding."</p>
    <div class="test-author">— Local Community Member</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="panel-1-footer">
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="c-item"><b>Address</b>Gordon Road, NG32LG, Nottingham</div>
    <div class="c-item"><b>Phone</b>0115 9586788</div>
    <div class="c-item"><b>Email</b><a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="fa93949c95ba9d889f839c88939b888994958e8e93949d929b97d4999597">[email&#160;protected]</a></div>
    <div class="c-item"><b>Web</b>www.greyfriarsnottingham.com</div>
  </div>
  <a class="cta-btn" href="#">Book Your Event Today</a>
</div>
```

  </div>

  <!-- ═══ PANEL 2: HIRE FORM + DECORATIONS ═══ -->

  <div class="panel-2">
    <div class="panel-2-hero">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Greyfriars function room full layout">
      <div class="panel-2-hero-overlay"></div>
      <div class="panel-2-hero-text">
        <div class="ph-eyebrow">Function Hire</div>
        <div class="ph-title">Room Hire &amp;<em> Decorations</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

```
<div class="panel-2-body">

  <div>
    <div class="section-label">Room Hire Rates</div>
    <div class="price-cards">
      <div class="price-card featured">
        <div class="pc-name">Hall Function Room</div>
        <div class="pc-rate">£50<span>/hr</span></div>
        <div class="pc-note">Available all hours</div>
      </div>
      <div class="price-card">
        <div class="pc-name">Lounge Bar</div>
        <div class="pc-rate">£40<span>/hr</span></div>
        <div class="pc-note">Out of public hours only</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="includes">
      <span class="inc-tag">Minimum 5 Hours</span>
      <span class="inc-tag">Drapes &amp; Lighting</span>
      <span class="inc-tag">Sweet Cart</span>
      <span class="inc-tag">Sequin Deco Wall</span>
      <span class="inc-tag">1 Hr Complimentary Setup/Décor Time Before Hire</span>
      <span class="inc-tag">Fully Stocked Bar</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="ornament">· ✦ ·</div>

  <div>
    <div class="section-label">Decoration Add-ons</div>
    <div class="deco-grid">
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Balloon Table Clusters</span><span class="deco-price">£10</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Chair Cover &amp; Bow</span><span class="deco-price">£2 per chair</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Table Linen</span><span class="deco-price">£10</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Backdrop/Balloon Wall</span><span class="deco-price">from £150</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Table Centrepieces</span><span class="deco-price">from £15</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Light Up Dancefloor</span><span class="deco-price">£300</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Light Up Numbers/Letters</span><span class="deco-price">£30 p/l</span></div>
      <div class="deco-row"><span class="deco-name">Circular Balloon Display</span><span class="deco-price">£150</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="deco-own">You are welcome to bring your own decorations — these must be set up and cleared away by yourself at the end of your function.</div>

  <div class="ornament">· ✦ ·</div>

  <div>
    <div class="section-label">Booking Enquiry</div>
    <div class="form-grid">
      <div class="ff"><label>Name</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ff"><label>Telephone / E-Mail</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ff"><label>Date of Booking</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ff"><label>Event Occasion</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ff"><label>Start Time</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ff"><label>Finish Time</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
      <div class="ff full"><label>Number of Guests</label><div class="ff-line"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cap-box"><b>Capacity Guide</b><br>Max 200 standing &nbsp;·&nbsp; 144 seated (no dancefloor) &nbsp;·&nbsp; 100 seated with dancefloor</div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="panel-2-footer">
  <p class="sig-note">I have read and accepted the terms &amp; conditions of the function hire at Greyfriars Club and understand I am bound by the rules of the club.</p>
  <div class="sig-line"></div>
  <div class="sig-lbl">Signature &amp; Date</div>
  <div class="deposit-badge">£150 Non-Refundable Deposit to Secure Your Date</div>
</div>
```

  </div>

  <!-- ═══ PANEL 3: CATERING + T&C ═══ -->

  <div class="panel-3">
    <div class="panel-3-hero">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Greyfriars top table dressed with white flowers">
      <div class="panel-3-hero-overlay"></div>
      <div class="panel-3-hero-text">
        <div class="ph-eyebrow">Catering Packages</div>
        <div class="ph-title">Food &amp; <em>Menus</em></div>
      </div>
    </div>

```
<div class="panel-3-body">

  <div>
    <div class="section-label">Cold Buffet — Minimum 30 Persons</div>
    <div class="pkg-row">
      <div class="pkg-card">
        <div class="pkg-head">
          <div class="pkg-title">Package 1</div>
          <div class="pkg-price">£7<span>pp</span></div>
          <div class="pkg-min">30–50 guests</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-body">
          <ul class="pkg-items">
            <li>Sandwich/Wrap Platters</li>
            <li>Sausage Rolls</li>
            <li>Pork Pies</li>
            <li>Savoury Eggs</li>
            <li>Pizza</li>
            <li>Garlic Bread</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pkg-card featured">
        <div class="pkg-head">
          <div class="pkg-title">Package 2</div>
          <div class="pkg-price">£8<span>pp</span></div>
          <div class="pkg-min">50–100+ guests</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-body">
          <ul class="pkg-items">
            <li>All of Package 1</li>
            <li>Cocktail Sausages</li>
            <li>Onion Rings</li>
            <li>SF Chicken Goujons</li>
            <li>Marinated Chicken Drumsticks</li>
            <li>Mixed Salad &amp; Coleslaw</li>
            <li>Potato Salad</li>
            <li>Indian Samosas &amp; Bhajis</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pkg-card">
        <div class="pkg-head">
          <div class="pkg-title">Self Catering</div>
          <div class="pkg-price">£100<span> fee</span></div>
          <div class="pkg-min">Ground fee applies</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pkg-body">
          <ul class="pkg-items">
            <li>External caterers welcome</li>
            <li>FSA Certificate required</li>
            <li>PAT test cert required</li>
            <li>Kitchen: NOT available</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="hot-box">
    <div class="hot-head">
      <h4>Hot Catering — Package 3</h4>
      <span>from £8pp · min 30 persons</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hot-grid">
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Pasta Bakes</span><span class="hp">£8pp</span></div>
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Hot Meat Cobs</span><span class="hp">£7pp</span></div>
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Chilli &amp; Rice</span><span class="hp">£10pp</span></div>
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Soup &amp; Rolls</span><span class="hp">£5pp</span></div>
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Chicken Curry</span><span class="hp">£10pp</span></div>
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Roast Dinners</span><span class="hp">£12pp</span></div>
      <div class="hot-item"><span>Beef Stew</span><span class="hp">£10pp</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="dessert-box">
    <h4>Desserts &amp; Extras</h4>
    <div class="dessert-grid">
      <div class="d-item"><span>Cheese Board</span><span class="dp">£50</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Vanilla Cheesecake</span><span class="dp">£25</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Dressed Salmon</span><span class="dp">£50</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Choc Fudge Cake</span><span class="dp">£30</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Fruit Platters</span><span class="dp">£30</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Chocolate Gateau</span><span class="dp">£30</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Apple Pie</span><span class="dp">£25</span></div>
      <div class="d-item"><span>Biscoff Cheesecake</span><span class="dp">£30</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="flex-note">Don't see what you need? We cater for any occasion — just ask and we'll do our very best to accommodate your event.</p>

  <div class="tc-box">
    <h4>Key Terms &amp; Conditions</h4>
    <div class="tc-alert">Failure to comply may result in immediate termination of your booking with a non-refundable fee.</div>
    <ul class="tc-list">
      <li><strong>£150 deposit</strong> required at time of booking</li>
      <li><strong>Balance due</strong> 4 weeks before event</li>
      <li><strong>No external drinks</strong> — bar purchases only</li>
      <li><strong>No confetti</strong>, party poppers or balloon cannons</li>
      <li><strong>Blu-tac only</strong> on walls — no cello tape</li>
      <li><strong>Music levels</strong> must stay reasonable</li>
      <li><strong>Smoking area</strong> available after 3:30pm weekdays</li>
      <li><strong>No kitchen use</strong> at any time</li>
      <li><strong>Aux-compatible</strong> device required for music</li>
      <li><strong>All items</strong> collected at end — nothing stored overnight</li>
      <li><strong>Guide Dogs</strong> only permitted on premises</li>
      <li><strong>Corkage fees</strong> apply for Weddings only</li>
    </ul>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="nr-banner">All Fees Are Non-Refundable &nbsp;·&nbsp; @GreyFriarsNottm</div>

<div class="panel-3-footer">
  <div class="footer-contact">
    <b>Contact Us</b>
    0115 9586788<br>
    <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection" class="__cf_email__" data-cfemail="7f161119103f180d1a06190d161e0d0c11100b0b161118171e12511c1012">[email&#160;protected]</a><br>
    www.greyfriarsnottingham.com
  </div>
  <div class="social-col">
    <span class="social-handle">📘 Facebook</span>
    <span class="social-handle">🐦 Twitter</span>
    <span class="social-handle">
```
